title: Initial Setup - e-commerce Order Management system
excerpt: Hey, new to Monday.com. I run an e-commerce business with a lot of moving parts and am looking for an expert to help me get setup with a customized, functional workflow using Monday.com. Thanks!

posts.author: Silverfish (Silverfish)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, new to Monday.com. I run an e-commerce business with a lot of moving parts and am looking for an expert to help me get setup with a customized, functional workflow using Monday.com. Thanks!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Silverfish and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

I work with CarbonWeb and we have been taking on custom projects for over 2 years now. We work with companies to develop their ideal workflows and solutions while they take full advantage of the platform. Recently we launched our end-to-end solution the CarbonCRM Suite which seems like something that would benefit you as you build out your workflows.

I would be interested in having an initial meeting with you to discuss your business, the ways you wish to use monday.com, and how you can leverage our team. Feel free to schedule here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Silverfish - welcome to the community! We’d be happy to discuss this with you further to see how we can be of assistance getting you up and running with the perfect solution.

Feel free to book a discovery session at your convenience here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting or you can reach us directly at info@greenllamas.com.

Also, check us out online to learn more about what we do!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Silverfish happy to help! Sending you a PM

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Silverfish ,

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. From your provided information, there are a few things that spring to mind I’d love to show you, as well as many questions to ask! Let’s connect.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your objectives at each level.

Meet with Peta

If you’re based in Europe/USA, please use this link for more accommodating meeting times: international clients - special hours

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream
